title: Shield leech weapon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Shield leecher weapon''' was a weapon used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] to drain enemy [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] power and convert it into their own. It was only used by the [[Keldabe-class cruiser|''Keldabe''-class battleship]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''

[[Category:Energy technology]]
[[Category:Starship weaponry]]
